flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Lassen Community College rose 40% between 2007 and 2010 ($2.9k → $4.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lassen Community College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.8k → $9.3k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Lassen Community College fell 18% between 2007 and 2010 (42.1% → 34.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lassen Community College rose 16% between 2007 and 2010 ($560 → $647).
